store.name: HyperKey Store
store.deliveryMessage: Delivery is handled through WhatsApp after manual payment review.

paymentReview.title: Payment review
paymentReview.message: We are checking your payment. Refresh later.

paymentRejected.title: Payment rejected
paymentRejected.message: Your payment proof could not be verified. Contact support with your Order ID.

customerInfoNeeded.title: Delivery information needed
customerInfoNeeded.message: Payment is verified. Send the requested delivery information below.

cancelled.title: Order cancelled
cancelled.message: This order was cancelled. Contact support with your Order ID if you need help.

faq.question: How do I receive my order?
faq.answer: After payment is reviewed, delivery appears on the Check Order page and we can also contact you on WhatsApp when needed.

faq.question: How long does delivery take?
faq.answer: Most orders are handled manually as soon as payment is verified. Some products can take longer depending on supplier availability.

faq.question: What payment methods are supported?
faq.answer: HyperKey Store supports D17 transfer, Flouci transfer, and Tunisie Telecom recharge cards when enabled.

faq.question: What if my payment is rejected?
faq.answer: Check the reason on the order status page, then contact support with your Order ID and payment proof.

faq.question: Do I need an account?
faq.answer: No account is required. Keep your Order ID and use the same WhatsApp number to check your order.

d17.label: D17 transfer
d17.instructions: Send the shown amount by D17, then enter only the authorization number from your receipt.

flouci.label: Flouci transfer
flouci.instructions: Send the shown amount by Flouci, then enter only the transaction ID from your receipt.

tt-card.label: Tunisie Telecom recharge card
tt-card.instructions: Enter the required Tunisie Telecom recharge card codes. Each code must be 15 digits.
